description: You are a Search Marketing Strategist conducting a monthly technical SEO health check for an e-commerce client (books.toscrape.com). Perform a full on-page SEO audit by crawling at least 100 pages of https://books.toscrape.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Export reports for page titles (including Title 1, length, and duplicate/missing flags), meta descriptions (including Meta Description 1 and duplicate/missing flags), and H1 tags (including H1-1 and missing flags) to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/. Write a comprehensive audit summary to ~/Documents/SEO/reports/on_page_audit.txt including issue counts for each category and prioritized recommendations. Login: user=ga.
